response.original_title: ヌードモデルNTR 上司と羞恥に溺れた妻の衝撃的浮気映像 - 古東まりこ
response.overview: My wife, Mariko, and I recently celebrated our 15th wedding anniversary. We rarely argued and were what you might call a devoted couple, but on the other hand, our relationship might have been ordinary and lacked excitement. Then that day, Mariko suggested that we try a nude photoshoot. To record her as she was, just as she was born. I wanted to fulfill my wife's wish, but I just couldn't shake off my embarrassment. When I looked troubled at work, my boss, Mr. Oshima, spoke to me. However, from the moment I confided this problem to Mr. Oshima, the gears of our marriage began to go awry.
response.title: Nude Model NTR: Shocking Footage of a Wife's Affair with Her Boss, Drowning in Shame - Mariko Koto
